finding.summary: Track contains no audible content; all level metrics indicate silence (sample peak -120 dBFS, RMS -120 dBFS, silence fraction 1.0).
finding.probable_cause: No media item present or media item contains only silence. The track is effectively dead air.
finding.confidence_reason: Silence fraction is 1.0 and both sample peak and RMS are at the noise floor (-120 dBFS), confirming absence of audio.

evidence_refs.description: Indicates verified isolated fixture capture, but no signal present.
Sample peak at -120 dBFS, effectively silence.
RMS level at -120 dBFS, effectively silence.
Fraction of dead air is 1.0, confirming full silence.

proposal.reason: Track is silent; no corrective action can be recommended without additional context (e.g., intended silence placeholder or missing source).
